Game: Bishoujo Senshi Sailor Moon Sailor Stars- Fuwa Fuwa Panic 2 1996-09-27T00:00:00-07:00 The second instalment on the Sailor Moon Balloon-popping puzzle series. Like the previous one, you must shoot groups of balloons to clear them from your screen, because the first player who has a balloon go beyond the playing field’s surface looses. Sound simple? Well, it is, but it’s a tough game to master… 2 <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/ab10aebe-1f53-48f3-8755-7de3e407b8f4.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/e13d527e-356b-4cd9-a19d-cc9149dc48f3.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/47bda8af-3bd2-4d87-9572-5581d458cd6f.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/eebfd12e-ca31-480f-988c-99c7fa3eefbf.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/0079079f-85bf-4051-9f17-6c6b0af5a386.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/f94e7063-f8a8-4f98-8113-2716351b5010.jpg 1 Puzzle Bandai Bandai
